goal: Create monorepo folder structure, backend and frontend package configs, TypeScript configs, and Docker files so the app can be started with docker-compose
summary: Phase 1 complete. Created the monorepo scaffold: backend and frontend package.json/tsconfig files, backend/frontend Dockerfiles with entrypoint and nginx config, root docker-compose.yml with PostgreSQL service, and root README.md with setup/env docs. All artifacts verified to exist.
stepSummaries:
1. Create /backend and /frontend directories with package.json, tsconfig.json, and necessary dev dependencies [verified]
  2. Write backend and frontend Dockerfiles and root docker-compose.yml with PostgreSQL service [verified]
  3. Add root README.md with setup instructions and environment variables [verified]
reviewerRationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Every step verified its artifacts with concrete file-existence checks. The Docker build itself will be exercised in the integration phase; this phase focused on scaffold file creation.
gateVerdicts.evidence: Step verify outputs confirmed: backend/package.json, backend/tsconfig.json, frontend/package.json, frontend/tsconfig.json, vite.config.ts, docker-compose.yml, backend/Dockerfile, backend/docker-entrypoint.sh (executable), frontend/Dockerfile, frontend/nginx.conf, README.md.

gateVerdicts.rationale: The phase goal was to create monorepo folder structure, package configs, TypeScript configs, and Docker files so the app can be started with docker-compose. All required files are present.
gateVerdicts.evidence: All expected scaffold files exist in /mnt/c/Users/Asus/Salary: backend and frontend directories with package.json/tsconfig, Docker files, docker-compose.yml, and README.md.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Nothing deferred in this phase. Dependency installation and container build/run will be validated in the integration phase.
gateVerdicts.evidence: Step 1-3 completed fully with no deferred items noted.
